items.name: Underhive Flak Jacket (Tan)
items.description:
Living in the lower hives is a harsh, often short existence, fraught with cruelty and danger. Flak jackets like these are often times heirlooms as well as essential clothing, protecting you from the stray bullet, blade, or blasts down in the violent passages of the underhive.
